case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $23,730.00 U.S.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY GIARLA, JUSTIN SKIPPER, KIRSTIN
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $7,119.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY DOUGLAS RAPPAPORT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT KIRSTIN SKIPPER. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $16,611.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY & ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $23,730.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
